titleStmt.title: SII 11.135: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 135. (B.K. No. 35 of 1928-29.) ARASIBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING ON A HILL TO THE RIGHT OF THE JAIN BASTI.

summary.p: This Kannaḍa inscription of the time of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) refers to his officer Mahāsāmantādhipati, Mahāprachaṇḍa-Daṇḍanāyaka, Mahāsēnādhipati, [A]vararasa, who was governing over Kisukāḍu Seventy and Kariviḍi Thirty. It registers a gift of land and house-sites made by the chief, with the consent of the king, to the Forty-Two learned Mahājanas of the Brahmapurī, at the capital Vikramapura.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 12, Prabhava, Śrāvaṇa, amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse. The cyclic year, month, etc., are the same as those in the foregoing record and correspond to A.D. 1087, August 1, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattribhuvana
malladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṁḍanāya kaṁ vairibhaya
dāyakaṁ rāyikakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidantagaṇḍaṁ durjjanaphaṇivainatēyaṁ śau cāṁjanēyaṁ mahālakṣmī
labdhavaraprasādaṁ kadanakēḷīvinōda śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ . pati kāryyasādhakaṁ nāmādi
samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ Avararasaru kisukāḍeḷpattu maṁ karivi
ḍi mūvattumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷuttamiḻdu śrī mattribhuvaname
lladēvargge binnapaṁgeydu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 12 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada śrā vaṇadamavāsye Āditya
vāra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīman rājadhāni vikramapurada brahmapuriya nālvattirva ru vidvāṁsarappa
mahājanakke dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamaśyamāgi munnina kēriyiṁ baḍagakoṭṭa mane Irppattu keyi nīḷa
pannaraḍu kaiyyagaladalu mane 12 Ēri baḍaga sirisada marada sthaḷadalu Eḷpattaṟa kōlalu koṭṭa mattaru 10
māriyabbeya keṟeya keḷage matta 1 beddavāḍadalu matta 1 Ajjagētavāḍa kamma 450 Aṁtu matta
12 kamma 450 Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadalu rakṣisidavaru vāraṇāsiyaloṁdu kōṭi kavile
yumananibaru vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgoṭṭa phalamaneyduvaru I dharma manaḷidavarā sthānadalanitu kavileyama nanibarbrāhmaṇaruma naḷida dōṣama neydu varu ©
Digital edition of SII 11.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
